configurations.name: vera-nexus
runtimeArgs: set PORT=5173&& set BASE_PATH=/&& npx --yes pnpm@9 --filter @workspace/vera-nexus run dev

configurations.name: api-server
runtimeArgs: set PORT=8080&& npx --yes pnpm@9 --filter @workspace/api-server run dev

configurations.name: mockup-sandbox
runtimeArgs: set PORT=5174&& npx --yes pnpm@9 --filter @workspace/mockup-sandbox run dev
